context:
Current State:
- Leftovers labeling protocol: write on label with 4 fields in one line: Date (YYYY-MM-DD) • contents • portion size (1 serving / 2 cups) • brief reheat note (oven 350°F 15–20m / microwave 2m); example: 2026-02-13 • chicken thigh, rice • 1 serving • microwave 90s, stir; labeling methods: freezer bags (direct on plastic with permanent marker); containers/lids (freezer tape + marker or preprinted labels); small items/sauces
- Note: My partner once tried to deep-fry in a pressure cooker because of a YouTube hack; that gave me a new respect for proper equipment.
